case_title: MONTGOMERY BUILDING, INC. vs. PHUNG, THANH NHAN DBA AMERICAN MORTGAGE GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY BUILDING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PHUNG, THANH NHAN DBA AMERICAN MORTGAGE GROUP
